title: Autoupdate column in portfolio view board when status is changed on a different board

posts.author: joelyd (joely donovan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I have been trying to configure an automation that puts an item, from an individual project board, into a column on the summary/portfolio view board once that item is in progress. Right now, I can only get the item to be moved to the portfolio view board as another concept or project, but I need the item to show up in just one column linked to its project, not as its own new one. Hopefully that makes sense… Does anyone have tips for achieving this?
